title: Validate Analytics Event Triggering for Key Actions
description: Tests that critical analytics events are fired correctly with the specified attributes during the user journey.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is eligible for the Trial Corner.

steps.description: 2. Click the homepage widget to navigate to the Trial Corner.
3. In the 'Trial Corner', click the 'Remind me' toggle.
5. In the pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.

expected_result: The following events must be fired in order: 1. 'trial-corner-widget-viewed'. 2. 'trial-corner-widget-clicked'. 3. 'trial-corner-viewed'. 4. 'remind-me-clicked' with 'page_source: trial_corner'. 5. 'cancel-clicked' with 'page_source: cancel_pop-up'.
